vanilla-bean-cheesecake-tartlets-with-ro.name: Vanilla Bean Cheesecake Tartlets With Roasted Rhubarb

ingredients.prep: such as Lu; from two 7.06-ounce packages

ingredients.item: -ounce package philadelphia-brand cream cheese (do not use reduced-fat or fat-free)
ingredients.prep: room temperature, or 8 ounces soft fresh goat cheese

ingredients.item: Chilled crème fraîche or sour cream roasted rhubarb

instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C. Combine ground cookies, pistachios, and sugar in processor and process until finely ground. Add melted butter and large pinch of salt and process until crumbs are evenly moistened. Divide mixture among eight 4 1/2-inch tartlet pans with removable bottoms (generous 1/3 cup for each) and press firmly and evenly onto bottom and up sides of pans. Bake until crust is golden, about 10 minutes. Cool completely on rack.

Combine cream cheese and sugar in medium bowl; scrape in seeds from vanilla bean. Using electric mixer, beat mixture until well blended. Beat cream and crème fraîche in another medium bowl until firm peaks form. Fold cream mixture into cream cheese mixture until smooth. Divide filling among baked crusts (scant 1/2 cup for each). Chill until filling firms up slightly, at least 6 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and keep chilled.

Preheat oven to 177°C. Combine rhubarb, sugar, orange juice, and orange peel in 11x7x2-inch glass baking dish; toss gently to coat. Dot with butter. Roast until rhubarb is tender but still retains its shape, about 35 minutes. Cool slightly. DO AHEAD Can be made 4 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.
Place 1 tartlet on each of 8 plates. Top with roasted rhubarb and serve.

vanilla-creams-with-strawberries-in-cass.name: Vanilla Creams With Strawberries In Cassis
instructions: Place 2 sieves over bowls; line sieves with cheesecloth or damp kitchen towel. Spoon yogurt into 1 sieve; spoon fromage blanc into second sieve. Cover; chill overnight.

Scrape drained yogurt and fromage blanc into large bowl; whisk to combine. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean. Gently mix in 3 tablespoons sugar and lemon peel. Whisk egg white in medium bowl until peaks form. Gently fold egg white into cheese mixture. Divide among 6 small bowls. Cover; chill at least 8 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.
Toss berries, 2 tablespoons sugar, and cassis in large bowl. Let stand until berries release juices, stirring occasionally, at least 30 minutes and up to 2 hours.
Sift or sprinkle brown sugar evenly over each dessert. Spoon berries and juices over.

vegan-creamy-mushroom-and-farro-soup.name: Vegan Creamy Mushroom And Farro Soup
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pot over medium heat. Add onion, celery, and carrots. Cook until onion is soft and translucent, 3 to 5 minutes. Add garlic, basil, and oregano and cook for another 30 seconds. Mix in mushrooms, salt, and pepper. Cover and cook, stirring occasionally, over medium-low heat for 10 minutes.
Uncover and add celery leaves, vegetable stock, farro, tomato paste, and soy sauce. Simmer until farro is cooked, 25 to 30 minutes.
Pour in coconut milk and heat until soup is warmed through, 5 to 10 minutes.

vegan-keto-friendly-thai-yellow-curry.name: Vegan Keto-friendly Thai Yellow Curry
instructions: Heat 4 tablespoons oil in a large saucepan over medium heat and cook curry paste until fragrant and starting to break up, about 3 minutes. Add tofu and onion. Stir to coat with curry paste and cook until tofu releases its moisture and starts to look drier, 3 to 5 minutes. Mix in soy sauce and vinegar. Stir in garlic, zucchini, and broccoli.

Mix everything in the saucepan well and cook until vegetables are tender, 5 to 7 minutes. If vegetables are not releasing enough moisture, add a splash of vegetable stock to prevent sticking too much; keep the heat medium to medium-high.

Once everything is yellow-tinged from the paste and your kitchen smells amazing, the vegetables should be looking brighter but not overcooked, and the pot should be making a high sizzling sound. Pour in vegetable stock and coconut cream. Mix, scraping the bottom to bring up any flavor bits, and lower heat. Only cover the saucepan if the amount of liquid looks very little compared to vegetables and tofu. Simmer for 5 to 10 minutes, checking every few minutes because it shouldn't take long from this point to warm through and meld flavors.

Meanwhile, heat remaining 2 tablespoons oil in a large skillet and add about 1/2 cup cauliflower rice, enough for 1 serving, in a thin layer. Cook until tender, about 2 minutes or longer, depending on your texture preference. Cook remaining cauliflower rice in batches depending on how many people are eating.

Check in on the curry and season with salt and pepper to taste. Curry texture should be thick and creamy and should taste a little tangy, a little coconutty, and have that aromatic kick characteristic of yellow curry. If the curry paste isn't shining through as much as you'd like, add a little glob of it and stir to dissolve. If you want more umami, add a little splash of soy sauce. If you want it more yellow, a pinch of turmeric powder can give it that brighter color.
Add 1/2 cup of cauliflower rice to a bowl and squeeze 1/2 a lime on top. Top with yellow curry.

vegan-pumpkin-soup-with-coconut-milk.name: Vegan Pumpkin Soup With Coconut Milk

ingredients.item: Ear fresh corn on the cob
Salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Heat oil in a pot over medium heat and cook onion until soft and translucent, about 5 minutes. Add garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add pumpkin, red bell pepper, and ginger; cook until softened, 5 to 8 minutes. Stir in curry paste and cook for 1 more minute. Pour in vegetable broth and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and cook until pumpkin and bell pepper are soft, about 25 minutes.
Cut corn kernels off the cob; add to the pot with coconut milk. Cook an additional 5 minutes; season with lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Sprinkle with Thai basil before serving.

vegetable-pakoras-indian-vegetarian-panc.name: Vegetable Pakoras (indian Vegetarian Pancakes)

ingredients.item: 150 g of chickpeas (you can buy here)
5 g (1 / 2 tablespoon to ra) of royal-type chemical yeast (you can buy here)
2 tablespoons of garham masala (you can buy here)

instructions: We peel the onion and cut it into fine juwith. We washed the pepper and chopped it. We washed the pumpkins and scrubbed them with the thick part of the pumpsuit and put them in a pumpsuit to get an excess of water out. We washed and scrubbed the spinach and cilantro and scrubbed them.

In a bowl we mix chickenpox with chewing and leaking. We will add water from little to little till we get a mass that isn't liquid but that can still be mixed with a spoon. We put all the vegetables and we mix.

We heat up a pan with abundant oil, if you have a cooking thermometer (as this) the temperature has to be about 170 ″ 3 ″. We'll put a tablespoon of the mix and fry both sides till it's well golden. We withdraw on absorbing paper and serve.

vegetable-soup-recipe-comedera.name: Vegetable Soup Recipe
vegetable-soup-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de sopa de verduras casera

ingredients.item: 1  tallo mediano de apio con sus hojas

instructions: It pics all plants into medium and small cubes. The herbs and spinach scrape them indiscriminately, as big as you want.
Put in a pot to heat up two tablespoons of olive oil. It goes with a few minutes to drink the onion.
Agrega la zanahoria, apio, cebolla verde y la guindilla.
Sigue revolviendo y agrega las vainas.
Now his turn to pumpkin and pumpkin.
He adds some water. About a liter and a half to two liters. Condition with salt and pepper and oregan.
Let's cook for about 20 minutes. Prove that pumpkin, pumpkin and carrot are ready. If so, add the herbs: cilantro, parsley, yebapeno and spinach. Check his salt.
Retira del fuego y sirve.
Puedes agregarle queso parmesano, le da un toque de sabor bastante rico.
El caldo de esta sopa de verduras es tan gustoso que puedes usarlo para saborizar otros platos, por ejemplo, para hacer risottos o salsas.

vegetarian-red-lentil-chili.name: Vegetarian Red Lentil Chili
instructions: Heat oil over medium heat in a Dutch oven. Add carrots, zucchini, onion, poblano pepper, 1 tablespoon chili powder, 1 tablespoon cumin, and smoked paprika. Cook until onion is soft and translucent, 3 to 4 minutes.

Remove zucchini from Dutch oven and set aside. Add garlic and jalapeno pepper to the vegetable mixture and stir to combine. Add tomato paste, 1 tablespoon chili powder, and 1 tablespoon cumin; stir for 2 to 3 minutes. Add diced tomatoes and vegetable broth, and bring to a boil. Once liquid boils, stir in kidney beans, black beans, and red lentils.
Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, leaving lid ajar, and simmer for 15 minutes. Season with remaining chili powder and cumin to taste.
Return zucchini to the pot and reduce heat to low. Cover and allow flavors to blend for about 20 minutes. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.

vegetarian-stuffed-eggplant-recipe-comed.name: Vegetarian Stuffed Eggplant Recipe

ingredients.item: 200 gr de tomate natural triturado o tomate frito  (cortada en cubos )
1 cda.   de aceite de oliva virgen

instructions: Wash the eggplants and cut them in half lengthwise. Do a cross-sectional cuts about 1 cm deep with the tip of a knife without cutting the skin from the vegetable.
It purifies the oven at 180 and 3.
Retira un poco de la pulpa de la berenjena, sin llegar a la piel.
In a frying pan pits the vegetables with some oil. Let's cook till the onion's clear. peppermint at your best.
En una fuente para horno, coloca un poco de aceite en el fondo y seguidamente las berenjenas.
Agrega en el interior de cada mitad de berenjena el sofrito.
Mete al horno y deja cocinar por 30 minutos.
After that time they're ready to enjoy.

venezuelan-guasacaca-recipe-comedera.name: Venezuelan Guasacaca Recipe

ingredients.item: Vinagre blanco de cocina al gusto

instructions: Para comenzar, vamos a abrir el aguacate por la mitad, con ayuda de un cuchillo bien afilado.
Luego, hay que retirar la semilla del aguacate.
The following will be to remove his pulp from every half of his avocado with a spoon and place it in a kitchen robot.
Luego, vamos a pelar la cebolla y a quitarle las puntas con un cuchillo. Enseguida vamos a picarla en 4 o 5 trozos, y a ponerlos en el robot.
To continue we will peel the garlic tooth, and we will put it into the robot as well.
Now we're going to wash his pimenton and get his head off (if it's about half up), his inner white and his seeds. Then we'll add it to the food processor as well.
The next thing you have to do, you'll have to wash the cilantro and parsley well. We have to scrain them and remove the thick stems, before we put them into the robot as well.
Finalmente, agregaremos un toque de sal al gusto, y otro de pimienta, para luego encender el robot y triturar todos los ingredientes.
For the robot and add a pair of tablespoons of vinegar to the seawater and an oil pint. Remix and stop the robot again.

At this point, depending on how consistent you will achieve, add more oil to the mixture (to taste). It also has to be tested to check for time and acidity. If necessary, add more salt, pepper or vinegar and mix everything again.

venison-bacon-burgers.name: Venison Bacon Burgers
instructions: Cook bacon in a skillet over medium heat until browned and crispy.
Pour bacon and grease into a heatproof bowl and allow to cool.
Heat oil in a skillet. Add shallots and garlic. Cook and stir until softened, about 3 minutes.
Mix with bacon.
Mix venison with cooled bacon mixture. Season with Worcestershire sauce, parsley, salt, and pepper. Stir in egg until evenly combined. Refrigerate for 20 minutes.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat.
Shape venison mixture into 6 patties.
Grill to desired doneness. Serve on toasted hamburger buns with your favorite toppings.

vinegar-sauce-french-cuisine-lezzet.name: Vinegar Sauce (french Cuisine)
instructions: 1. A sauce that fits all kinds of salty and baked vegetables in the grill.
2. 1 tablespoon of apple vinegar and 3 tablespoons of olive oil in a deep container.
3. A small piece of sea salt, a few freshly drawn peppers, 1 teaspoon mustard and 1 tablespoon of fine chopped parsley and mix again.
4. You can transfer the glass to a jar and keep it in the refrigerator for 3 days.
